summary: Complete testing of the new 6-step Action Flow feature. All 24 flow tests passed. All 10 regression tests passed. The Action Flow replaces the old Post nav with a new Flow nav (Zap icon) and implements Need→Choice→Action→Reaction→Result→Reward behavioral engine.
critical_code_review_comments: ActionFlow.js implements complete 6-step flow with animated transitions (flowSlideIn/flowSlideBack)
Step bar with 6 steps (Need, Choice, Action, Reaction, Result, Reward) at bottom
Active step highlighted in cyan, done steps also highlighted
Back button only visible on steps 1-2 (Choice, Action) - not visible after posting
Bottom tab bar correctly hidden when flow is active (tab !== 'flow')
Form validation: Publish button disabled until title+description filled
Continue button in Choice step disabled until selection made
POST /api/actions/post integration verified - action created successfully
Position/orientation data fetched and displayed in Need step
Result step computes deltas from baseline vs fresh position fetch
Reward step displays consequence_multiplier and meaning from position data
Flow resets on Done button click (state cleared, navigates back to feed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Flow feature tested. Key details: 1) Flow nav button has data-testid='nav-flow' with Zap icon. 2) ActionFlow component renders 6 steps with animated transitions. 3) Step indicators: data-testid='flow-step-{key}' where key is need/choice/action/reaction/result/reward. 4) CTA buttons: data-testid='flow-cta-{step}'. 5) Step bar at bottom with progress indicator. 6) Back button only shows on steps 1-2 (before action posted). 7) Form inputs: flow-input-title, flow-input-description, flow-cat-{category}. 8) Choice cards: flow-choice-public, flow-choice-private. 9) Flow uses localStorage token for auth. 10) Done button resets flow and navigates to feed.
